Table	Create Table
streaming_status	CREATE TABLE `streaming_status` (
  `id` int(11) NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,
  `channel_id` int(11) DEFAULT NULL,
  `status` enum('offline','starting','live','paused','ending') COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci DEFAULT 'offline',
  `viewer_count` int(11) DEFAULT '0',
  `peak_viewers` int(11) DEFAULT '0',
  `stream_url` text COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci DEFAULT NULL,
  `started_at` timestamp NULL DEFAULT NULL,
  `ended_at` timestamp NULL DEFAULT NULL,
  `created_at` timestamp DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  `updated_at` timestamp DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  PRIMARY KEY (`id`) /*T![clustered_index] CLUSTERED */
) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COLLATE=utf8mb4_unicode_ci
